task_completion.description: Agent accesses the Aerobridge system to locate the FlightPlan model.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the Aerobridge Django admin interface, or a terminal/editor showing Aerobridge source code (e.g., models.py) or database schema.

task_completion.description: Agent identifies or filters the specific flight plans with start times strictly before January 1, 2024.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A list of flight plans being filtered by date in the GUI, or a database query/script selecting records with a start time before '2024-01-01'.

task_completion.description: Agent serializes the historical records and saves them to /home/ga/archive_pre2024.json.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal command (e.g., python manage.py dumpdata), a Python script writing to the file, or a file manager/editor showing the creation and content of '/home/ga/archive_pre2024.json'.

task_completion.description: Agent deletes the historical flight plans (pre-2024) from the database.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A deletion confirmation in the GUI (e.g., Django admin 'Are you sure you want to delete'), a SQL DELETE command, or a script calling `.delete()` on the filtered queryset.

task_completion.description: Agent ensures that flight plans starting on or after January 1, 2024, remain intact.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A view of the remaining flight plans in the GUI, or a database query/script output showing that records with dates >= 2024-01-01 are still present in the system.

integrity.description: Verifies that the agent extracted real data from the system instead of fabricating the JSON file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses database queries, Django ORM, or export tools rather than typing out hardcoded JSON data.

integrity.description: Verifies the archive was saved to the exact requested location.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file path '/home/ga/archive_pre2024.json' is visible in the script, terminal command, or file explorer.

integrity.description: Verifies that the agent did not just delete all records or bypass the date filter.
integrity.visual_evidence: The deletion action (GUI or code) explicitly includes a condition or selection for records before 2024-01-01.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The cutoff date for archiving is January 1, 2024. Records strictly before this date must be archived to '/home/ga/archive_pre2024.json' and deleted from the database. Records from January 1, 2024 onwards must remain intact. The Aerobridge admin credentials are 'admin' / 'adminpass123'.
